nasb.text: and you shall take possession of the land and live in it, for I have given the land to you to possess it.

esv.text: And you shall take possession of the land and settle in it, for I have given the land to you to possess it.

cnv.text: 你們要佔領那地，住在那裡，因為我已經把那地賜給你們作產業。

ccb.text: 你们要占领那片土地，住在那里，因为我已经把那里赐给你们作产业了。
